name: Standard 3-1-0
description: Standard point system: 3 points for win, 1 for draw, 0 for loss

name: Classic 2-1-0
description: Classic point system: 2 points for win, 1 for draw, 0 for loss

name: No ties
description: 3 points for win, 1 for draw, 0 for loss, plus 1 bonus point for winning on penalties in a drawn match
